title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise structured queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails via code rather than prompts, and runtime agent steering for self-correction. The methods are applied to a travel agent built with Strands Agents and shown to work with multiple LLM providers.
